title: Jenica Sonsen
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Bureaucrat |image=[[File:Jenica_Sonsen.jpg]] |name=Jenica Sonsen |homeworld=[[Centerpoint Station]]''[[Showdown at Centerpoint]]'' |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Female]] |pronouns=She/her |height= |mass= |hair=Black |feathers= |eyes= |skin=Pale |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=*[[Federation of the Double Worlds]] **[[Executive Secretariat]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Well, anyway. I'm Jenica Sonsen, C-point COO Ad-Op.''"''
''"''What?''"''
''"''Sorry. Force of habit. Centerpoint Chief Operations Officer, Administration and Operations. Basically, I run the place, these days.|Jenica Sonsen and Luke Skywalker|}} '''Jenica Sonsen''' was the administrator of [[Centerpoint Station]] during the [[Corellian Crisis|First Corellian Insurrection]] and throughout the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. She was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|woman]] with expressive eyebrows, curly black hair, and a long thin face. ==Biography== {{Quote|Maybe you've got a point. But I have to know what you're doing here. Your ships blew out of nowhere and then those fighters bugged out too.|Jenica Sonsen|}} Sonsen had an important role in the Centerpoint Crisis guiding around [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]], [[Belindi Kalenda]], and [[Gaeriel Captison]]. She even was attracted to Lando and tried to move on her feelings, which Lando refused due to making a previous promise to another [[Tendra Risant Calrissian|person]]. She continued in that job as late as [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]], when she was heading the team that was attempting to map the station's interior.''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos II: Jedi Eclipse]]'' {{Char-stub}} ==Appearances== *''[[Showdown at Centerpoint]]'' {{1st}} *''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos II: Jedi Eclipse]]'' ==Sources== *''[[Cracken's Threat Dossier]]'' *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Jenica Sonsen |uk=Дженіка Сонсен }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Sonsen, Jenica}} [[Category:Bureaucrats]] [[Category:Centerpoint Station residents]] [[Category:Females]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Individuals with she/her pronouns]]
